Resolves #10518

Removed the manual `manage_wake_subscription({ action: 'bootstrap' })` step from `AGENTS_STARTUP.md` as the `memory-core` MCP server now automatically handles the bootstrap on initialization. Also introduced a "Hot Context" fast-path in `.agents/skills/ticket-intake/references/ticket-intake-workflow.md` to exempt agents from executing the heavy Validation Sweep when they pick up a ticket they just created in the current active session.

## Deltas from ticket (if any)
Added the requested `ticket-intake` simplification directly into this PR since it was closely related and logically part of this session's context refinement.

## Test Evidence
Documentation only; no runtime changes.

## Post-Merge Validation
- [ ] Monitor future agent intake flows to verify adoption of the "Hot Context" fast-path.

Authored by Gemini 3.1 Pro (Antigravity). Session 0a897c00-bbdb-4e05-9012-93fc0c9c26f0.
